evals.expected_output: Promotion report header appears and shows promoted/skipped counts
assertions: Output contains the text '已 promote 到'

files.content:
# Test Errors

## ERR-20260101-001 | status:new
**错误**：looper-case1 模块初始化失败
**根因**：配置文件路径硬编码导致跨环境不可用
**解决方案**：改用环境变量 CONFIG_PATH 注入路径

# Test Learnings

## LEARN-20260101-001 | status:new
**内容**：looper-case1 eval 文件需使用 claude_home/ 前缀
**适用场景**：所有在 looper 容器内验证的 packer plugin

evals.expected_output: Shows promotion report for errors.md even though learnings.md is missing
assertions: Output contains the text '已 promote 到'

files.content:
# Test Errors

## ERR-20260102-002 | status:new
**错误**：looper-case2 数据库连接超时
**根因**：连接池未设置超时上限
**解决方案**：设置 pool_timeout=30 并添加重试逻辑

evals.expected_output: Promotion report shows non-zero promoted count and mentions target file
assertions: Output contains the text '已 promote 到'

files.content:
# Test Errors

## ERR-20260103-003 | status:new
**错误**：looper-case3 缓存击穿导致服务雪崩
**根因**：热点 key 过期时并发请求未加互斥锁
**解决方案**：加分布式锁或使用 singleflight 合并请求

evals.expected_output: Promotion report shows entry skipped due to incomplete fields

files.comment: Dual-path: LLM may compute project key as -looper_work (underscore) or -looper-work (hyphen)
files.content:
# Test Errors

## ERR-20260104-004 | status:new
**错误**：looper-case4 内存泄漏
**根因**：事件监听器未在组件卸载时移除

# Test Errors

## ERR-20260104-004 | status:new
**错误**：looper-case4 内存泄漏
**根因**：事件监听器未在组件卸载时移除

evals.expected_output: Promotion report shows new learnings entry promoted while errors are already status:promoted
assertions: Output contains the text '已 promote 到'

files.comment: errors.md: all entries already promoted — no new errors to promote
files.content:
# Test Errors

## ERR-20260105-005 | status:promoted
**错误**：looper-case5 配置加载失败
**根因**：配置键名拼写错误
**解决方案**：统一使用常量定义配置键名

# Test Errors

## ERR-20260105-005 | status:promoted
**错误**：looper-case5 配置加载失败
**根因**：配置键名拼写错误
**解决方案**：统一使用常量定义配置键名

files.comment: learnings.md: fresh complete entry — should be promoted
files.content:
# Test Learnings

## LEARN-20260105-001 | status:new
**内容**：looper eval 需提供双路径覆盖以应对 LLM 路径推导不一致
**适用场景**：所有在 looper 容器内验证的 packer plugin eval

# Test Learnings

**内容**：looper eval 需提供双路径覆盖以应对 LLM 路径推导不一致
**适用场景**：所有在 looper 容器内验证的 packer plugin eval
